content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Special Segments of Permutation". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1156/problem/E
constraints: The input array will contain distinct integers from 1 to n.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the permutation.
content.outputFormat: The number of special segments in the permutation.

solution.approach: Use a brute force approach to check all possible segments of the permutation.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
count = 0
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(i, n):
        min_val = arr[i]
        max_val = arr[i]
        for k in range(i, j + 1):
            if arr[k] < min_val: min_val = arr[k]
            if arr[k] > max_val: max_val = arr[k]
        if max_val - min_val == j - i: count += 1
print(count)
